data.title: Amazon Cancels Some China Orders After Tariffs, Vendors To Hike US Prices
data.description: Amazon cancels some inventory orders from China after tariffs.

data.title: Wall Street Tumbles, Dollar Crashes, Gold Hits Record Highs As Inflation Cools More Than Predicted: What's Driving Markets Thursday
data.description: Wall Street pulls back as investors weigh economic risks after tariff pause and lower inflation. Fed rate cuts likely but tariff drama continues.

data.title: Accenture And Fincantieri Launch Digital Venture To Modernize Shipbuilding
data.description: Fincantieri and Accenture have launched Fincantieri Ingenium, a digital venture focused on transforming shipbuilding and port logistics. The joint effort will use AI, data analytics, and cybersecurity to modernize maritime operations and reduce environmental impact.

data.title: Chile Moves To Legalize Adult-Use Cannabis With Backing From Presidential Candidate
data.description: Chile moves closer to legal cannabis as lawmakers, activists, and a presidential hopeful back sweeping reform.

data.title: Constellation Brands Earns Analyst Support As Q4 Beat Sets Stage For Strategic Reset
data.description: Constellation Brands (STZ) reported upbeat Q4 sales, but cautious FY26 outlook due to tariff impact and beer sales decline. Analysts maintain Buy ratings.
